what is novamind: NovaMind is a self-hosted AI chat platform built by Devang Shah. It runs an LLM-style chat UI on top of a FastAPI backend, with optional local-only engines that don't call any external service.
what can you do: I can answer FAQs about NovaMind, do arithmetic, recall pre-loaded code snippets, reason about time/date (today, tomorrow, next Monday), and summarise our conversation. I'm a rule-based local engine — not a foundation model — so I won't match GPT/Claude on open-ended chat, but I'm free, fast, and private.
who made you: NovaMind AI was built by Devang Shah. The local engine in this build is rule-based, hand-written in Python, and runs entirely on the server you're talking to.
who built you: NovaMind AI was built by Devang Shah.
are you free: Yes — NovaMind local engine is free, runs offline, and doesn't call any paid API.
is this free: Yes. The local engine is free and runs on the same machine as the backend.
pricing: NovaMind local engine has no cost — it runs in-process on the backend. The hosted demo at web-ivory-eta-87.vercel.app is also free.
what model are you: I'm the NovaMind local engine (rule-based, v1). I'm not a foundation model. I match user messages to handlers for math, time/date, FAQ, code snippets, and conversation metadata, and fall back to a clear 'I don't know' message otherwise.
what model: NovaMind local engine v1 — rule-based, no external API.
are you gpt: No. I'm not GPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other foundation model. I'm a small rule-based engine that handles FAQs, math, time/date, code snippets, and conversation summaries. The frontend (NovaMind AI) was built by Devang Shah.
are you chatgpt: No. I'm not ChatGPT. I'm NovaMind local engine — a much smaller, rule-based system.
are you claude: No. I'm not Claude. I'm NovaMind local engine.
are you open source: The NovaMind AI codebase is in a public repository. The local engine in this build is plain Python with no third-party model dependencies.
is the code open source: The NovaMind AI codebase is in a public repository. The local engine is plain Python and easy to read.
data privacy: Your messages stay on the backend that processes them. The local engine does not call any external service, so nothing leaves the server. The browser-only demo mode stores data in your browser's localStorage.
is my data private: Yes. Messages go to the NovaMind backend, are processed in-process, and are not sent to any third party. The mock-mode demo runs entirely in your browser.
supported languages: The local engine itself reads and writes English. The web UI uses the same language you type in.
what languages: English. The engine matches English keywords.
how do i report a bug: Open an issue in the repository, or message the maintainer (Devang Shah) directly.
how to deploy: Two halves: (1) backend — `cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload`, or deploy the existing Dockerfile to Render/Railway; (2) frontend — set `NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=false` and `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=<your backend>` in `web/.env.local`, then `cd web && npm run dev` (or push to Vercel).
how do i deploy: Backend: `uvicorn app.main:app --reload` or use the included Dockerfile. Frontend: set NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=false and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL, then `npm run dev` or push to Vercel.
how to run locally: Backend: `cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn app.main:app --reload`. Frontend: `cd web && npm install && npm run dev`. With `NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=true` you can run the frontend without a backend.
how do i run this: Backend: `cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload`. Frontend: `cd web && npm run dev`. The Vercel demo runs in browser-only mock mode (no backend needed).
what is the cli: `python -m backend.cli chat --user <email> --password <pwd>` opens a terminal chat that talks to the same backend the web UI uses. Slash commands: /help, /clear, /history, /model, /quit.
how do i use the terminal: Run `python -m backend.cli chat --user admin@novamind.ai --password admin123` (or any other user). Type your message and press Enter. Type /help for slash commands.
what is mock mode: When NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=true, the frontend uses an in-browser localStorage backend. Data stays on your device, no server needed. Use the demo account admin@novamind.ai / admin123 or create your own.
how to exit: Type /quit in the CLI, or press Ctrl+D. In the web UI, click your avatar in the top-right.
thank you: You're welcome! Anything else I can help with?
goodbye: Goodbye! Type /quit or press Ctrl+D to exit.
